daily.today_energy: Your intuition is hitting different today. Trust those gut feelings—they're basically your spiritual GPS rn. The vibe is introspective but in a good way, like you're finally getting clarity on something that's been lowkey bothering you.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, today's about authentic connection. If you've been holding back how you really feel, the universe is giving you a gentle nudge to speak your truth. Real talk attracts real people.
daily.career: Your creative energy is immaculate. This is the day to pitch that idea you've been sitting on or take a small risk on a project. Your unique perspective is literally your superpower—don't dim it to fit in.
daily.health: Your body's asking for gentle movement and hydration, honestly. Something like a walk or stretching hits right today. Mental health check: journaling or talking to someone you trust could feel really grounding.

weekly.overview: Mercury's vibes are shifting your communication game this week, Pisces. You're feeling less in your head and more grounded in what actually matters. Trust the quiet moments—they're where the real magic happens. Intuition is your superpower rn.
weekly.love: Your emotional walls are coming down in the best way possible. If you're crushing on someone, they're picking up on your energy more than you realize. Single? Give yourself permission to be a little vulnerable. Connection is waiting.
weekly.career: Stop second-guessing yourself. A project or idea you've been sitting on deserves attention this week. Your creative problem-solving is elite right now. Small wins count—celebrate them and build momentum from there.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness this week. Movement that feels like self-care (yoga, walks, dancing) hits different than pushing hard. Sleep quality matters more than quantity—prioritize rest over productivity for real.
